nodes.name: Cron - Last Day of Month
nodes.notes: Runs at 7am on the last day of every month

nodes.name: Salesforce - Get Commit Opps
nodes.notes: Pull all New Business Commit deals with CloseDate this month

nodes.name: Filter - Identify Slipped Deals
nodes.notes: Keep only deals that slipped (not closed by month end)

nodes.name: Attention - Get Calls per Deal
nodes.notes: Fetch all calls linked to each slipped opportunity

nodes.name: Analyze - Flag Risk Signals
nodes.notes: Identify SPICED gaps and call risk signals per deal

values.content: You are a RevOps AI analyst specializing in B2B SaaS sales diagnostics. Generate structured post-mortems for slipped forecast deals. Be direct, specific, and actionable. Always cite specific signals from the data. Respond in JSON only.

nodes.name: Claude - Generate Post-Mortem
nodes.notes: AI generates structured post-mortem for each slipped deal

nodes.name: Parse & Sort Results
nodes.notes: Parse AI output, separate managed pushes, sort by ARR

nodes.name: Google Calendar - Find Forecast Meeting
nodes.notes: Find the first forecast leadership meeting in the new month

nodes.name: Build Slack Message
nodes.notes: Compose the full Slack DM from all post-mortems

nodes.name: Slack - Send DM to Hassan
nodes.notes: Send the report as a direct Slack DM on the 1st of the month
